rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to component ports.
Use visible identifiers and feature names in AGREE contracts; avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in type annexes.
generic_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be syntactically valid and scoped to their owning component.
Constants and equations in AGREE should use valid scalar types: int, real, bool.
Assumptions and guarantees should reference named constants or visible features when possible.
Assignments in AGREE are valid only in implementation scopes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;` for contract statements.
Equations and constants are declared with `eq name : type = expression;` and `const name : type = value;`.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names like Deadline or Period as AGREE variables unless explicitly typed in the model.
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through visible variables or outputs.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
